ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_country" TEXT /* Country of the buyer */,
  "buyer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "buyer_address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the buyer registered on the platform */,
  "buyer_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login for the buyer */,
  "buyer_status" TEXT /* Status of the buyer */,
  "buyer_preferences" TEXT /* JSON object for storing buyer preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "seller_email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "seller_country" TEXT /* Country of the seller */,
  "seller_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "seller_address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "seller_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the seller registered on the platform */,
  "seller_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login for the seller */,
  "seller_status" TEXT /* Status of the seller */,
  "seller_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock of the product */,
  "product_discount" REAL /* Discount percentage on the product */,
  "product_tax" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in kilograms */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "product_color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "product_material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "product_warranty" TEXT /* Warranty information for the product */,
  "product_return_policy" TEXT /* Return policy for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "buyer_id" TEXT /* ID of the buyer making the purchase */,
  "seller_id" TEXT /* ID of the seller listing the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code of the product being purchased */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in the specified currency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "transaction_payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "transaction_payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "transaction_tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "transaction_discount" REAL /* Discount amount for the transaction */,
  "transaction_total" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_currency_exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for the transaction if in a different currency */,
  "transaction_referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the buyer */,
  "transaction_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the buyer making the transaction */,
  "transaction_device" TEXT /* Device used by the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "buyer_id" TEXT /* ID of the buyer writing the review */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code of the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the buyer */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "review_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  "review_unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as unhelpful */,
  "review_images" TEXT /* URLs of images attached to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the transaction */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipping */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "shipping_tracker" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_estimated_delivery" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code of the product in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in inventory */,
  "inventory_low_threshold" INTEGER /* Low stock threshold for the product */,
  "inventory_reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock is low */,
  "inventory_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "inventory_supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code")
)
